prior_attempts.root_result_excerpt: FINAL_ANSWER: No JUSTIFICATION: The Compton frequency (f_C = mc^2/h) is determined by the particle's rest mass, whereas the Unruh frequency (f_U = ac/2pi h) at cosmological acceleration (a approx cH_0) is determined by the Hubble constant. - correctly dismisses the resonance as impossible
- identifies the dimensional gap

JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
